series_title:
Master Files of Savings &
Loan Associations & State
Savings Banks Charters
series_description:
Master Files of Savings & Loan
Associations & State Savings Banks
Charters
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 25 years

series_description: Charter and application logs
retention_statement: Permanent

series_description: Thrift charter quarterly reports.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 25 years

series_description: Exam Workpapers – Thrift
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 15 years

series_description:
Charter application files - withdrawn,
rescinded, or denied.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years

series_description:
Documentation related to specific license
numbers, including inactive, denied and
withdrawn license applications.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years

series_description:
Legal files for enforcement/disciplinary
actions, license denials, and recovery fund
claims.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years

series_description:
Hearing documents related to an
enforcement action.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years

series_description:
Original complaint, investigation
documents, reports and closing
documents
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years

series_description:
Examination reports, accompanying
letters, and responses.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years

series_description: Exam Workpapers – Mortgage
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

series_description:
Including any supporting documentation
created and/or used to justify and support
legislative appropriations requests by an
agency.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: The final version
of Legislative Appropriation
Requests must be submitted to the
Texas State Publications Depository
Program per 13 TAC 3.3(a)(3)(A).
Working files and related
documentation used in creating the
final plan are not subject to archival
review and may be disposed of at
the expiration of the retention
period.

series_description:
Any document that officially initiates,
rescinds, or amends general office
procedures.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 1 year

series_description:
Any document that initiates, rescinds, or
amends a regulation, policy, or procedure
that governs the programs, services, or
projects of an agency.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 3 years

series_description:
Calendars, appointment books or
programs and scheduling or itinerary
records, purchased with state funds or
maintained by staff during business hours
that document appointments, itineraries
and other activities of agency officials or
employees.
retention_statement: Calendar Year End plus 1 year
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only the
calendars, appointment, and
itinerary records of elected officials,
executive staff, board or
commission members, division
directors, and program heads
require archival review. Contact the
State Archives when the records
have met their retention periods.
CAUTION: A record of this type
purchased with personal funds, but
used by a state official or employee
to document his or her work
activities may be a state record and
subject to this retention period. See
Open Records Decision 635 issued
in December 1995 by the Attorney
General.

series_description:
News, press releases, or any public
relations files maintained or issued by an
agency includes print, electronic, audio
and audiovisual records.

Includes all correspondence and
documentation relating to requests for
records that are furnished to the public
under the Public Information Act (Chapter
552, Government Code). Also includes
withdrawn requests.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_description:
Includes all correspondence and
documentation relating to requests for
records that are excepted under the Public
Information Act (Chapter 552,
Government Code), including records
provided to the legislature under section
552.008.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
Charts or diagrams that show the
structure of an agency and the
relationships and relative ranks of its
departments and job positions.
retention_statement: Until Superseded
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only charts
showing the overall arrangement
and administrative structure of the
state agency need to be transferred
to the Archives and Information
Services Division, Texas State
Library and Archives Commission.
Organizational charts showing
division/department level detail are
not considered archival.

series_description:
Copies of all proposed, withdrawn,
emergency, and adopted rules; open
meeting notices; or any other documents
required by law to be submitted to the
Texas Register.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_description:
Drafts of proposed legislation and related
correspondence.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_description:
Notes or text of speeches, papers,
presentations, or reports delivered in
conjunction with agency work.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only speeches,
papers, and presentations given by
or on behalf of executive staff,
board or commission members,
division directors and program
heads require archival review.

series_description:
Records created by or on behalf of an
agency in anticipation of or in the
adjudication of a lawsuit.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Cases that set
legal precedents or exhibit
historical value will be evaluated by
the Archives and Information
Services Division of the Texas State
Library and Archives Commission
for archival preservation.

series_description:
Logs or similar records used to register
persons appearing before state agencies
as required by Chapter 2004, Government
Code, including quarterly reports filed with
the Texas Ethics Commission.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_description:
Operational strategic plans, which include
descriptions of information resources
programs, prepared in accordance with
Government Code, 2054.095 and
2056.002. Includes working files and
related documentation used in creating
the final plan.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: The final version
of Strategic Plans must be
submitted to the Texas State
Publications Depository Program
per 13 TAC 3.3(a)(2)(C). Working
files and related documentation
used in creating the final plan are
not subject to archival review and
may be disposed of at the
expiration of the retention period.

series_description:
Self-evaluations and plans documenting
compliance with the requirements of the
American with Disabilities Act.

Minutes or notes, and supporting
documentation, taken at internal agency
staff meetings.

Biennial narrative reports to the governor
and legislature as required by an agency's
enabling statutes, including annual
narrative reports if they are required by
statute. Includes working files and related
documentation used in creating final
report.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: The final version
of these agency reports must be
submitted to the Texas State
Publications Depository Program
per 13 TAC 3.3. The requirement is
met by sending the required copies
of the reports to the Texas State
Publications Depository Program,
Texas State Library and Archives
Commission. Working files and
related documentation used in
creating the final report may be
disposed of at the expiration of the
retention period.

series_description:
Manuals, guidelines, administrative rules,
or similar records distributed internally for
the use of employees or externally to the
public or those individuals or entities
regulated by an agency that sets out the
rules, policies, and procedures that govern
an agency's programs, services, or
projects. Includes working files and related
documentation used in creating rules,
policies, and procedures.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Working files and
related documentation used in
creating the final rules, policies, and
procedures, are not subject to
archival requirement and may be
disposed of at the expiration of the
retention period.

series_description:
Reports made to the Office of Attorney
General (OAG) on an agency's Public
Information Act activities, per
Government Code, 552.010.

Transcripts and final decisions of hearings
conducted as part of the regulatory
process, and hearings on proposed rules
and changes.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
CAUTION: These records may be
maintained with related
information, including meeting
notices, proofs of publication, and
meeting minutes, and require a
longer retention period.

series_title:
Sunset Review Report and
Related Documentation
series_description:
Sunset Review Report, agency self-study,
and other correspondence and supporting
documentation related to the Sunset
review process for state agencies.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
Final agreement described by Government
Code 2009.054(c), associated with a
matter conducted under alternative
dispute resolution procedure in which
personnel of a state agency participated as
a party in the agency's behalf.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years
legal_citation:
Texas Civil Practice
and Remedies Code,
154.071.

series_description:
Master versions of all forms used
internally and externally by the agency,
including subsequent revisions to an
agency form or any associated design or
design modification requests.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
A records retention schedule (i.e. form SLR
105) that identifies the records that are
created and maintained by an agency,
provides the minimum timeframes the
records must be retained, and includes
instructions for their disposition. This
series may include working files and
documentation of certification and
approval by the Texas State Library and
Archives Commission.
retention_statement: Until Superseded
comments:
Original is retained for 50 years by
the State and Local Records
Management Division, Texas State
Library and Archives Commission.

series_description:
Forms used to track the transmittal of
records to/from onsite and offsite storage
areas or a transfer of physical custody.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_description:
Logs or similar records listing records
disposed of by an agency, which might
include records series title, dates of
records, and date of disposition.
comments:
CAUTION: Disposition can mean
destroyed or transferred.

series_description:
Agency copy of form RMD 106 granting a
state agency the authorization to store
records at the State Records Center.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments: Obsolete record.

series_description:
Worksheets or working papers used to
capture records inventory information,
including location tracking and to
document existence and requirements of
a records series.
retention_statement: Until Superseded

series_description:
Documentation used to provide and
improve access to records. Includes
indexes, card files, shelf lists, registers,
guides, and other finding aids.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
CAUTION: These records must carry
the same retention period and
archival code of the records they
support.

series_description:
Records management plans and similar
records that establish the policies and
procedures under which records and
information are managed in an agency.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 1 year

series_description:
Transmittals and related service
documentation (e.g. form RMD 109) for
disaster recovery services provided by
TSLAC or other entities.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_description:
Forms used by TSLAC (e.g. form RMD 113)
or other entities to establish disaster
recovery services, authorize agency staff
to access the media, etc.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_description:
One copy of each state publication as
defined on page xi of this schedule, except
a publication that is subject to a different
retention period in this schedule. For
example, a meeting agenda (see item
number 1.1.058) also meets the definition,
but it must be retained permanently; item
numbers 1.1.004, 1.1.055, 1.1.066,
1.1.068, and 4.5.003, which also made the
definition, are closely associated with the
appropriations process and must be
retained AC+6.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
CAUTION: Many state publications
must be submitted to the Texas
State Publications Depository
Program, Texas State Library and
Archives Commission, by law
(Government Code 441.101 -
441.106). The Texas State Library
and Archives Commission will retain
a copy of all state publications
submitted to it on a continuing
basis, subject to periodic evaluation
to determine if the publication
merits further retention. For
additional information and
requirements concerning state
publications made available to the
public through the Internet, consult
the administrative rules of the
Texas State Publications Depository
Program Of the Texas State Library
and Archives Commission (13 TAC
§§3.1 - 3.16).

series_description:
Automated software applications and
operations system files including job
control language, program listings/source
code, etc.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
CAUTION: Software needed for
access to electronic records must
be retained for the period of time
required to access the records.

series_description:
Records documenting operational and
maintenance requirements of computer
hardware such as operating manuals,
hardware/operating system requirements,
hardware configurations, equipment
control systems, and associated
processing files.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
CAUTION: Software needed for
access to electronic records must
be retained for the period of time
required to access the records.

series_description:
Records adequate to specify all technical
characteristics necessary for reading or
processing electronic records; to
document modifications to computer
programs; to access, retrieve, manipulate,
and interpret data in an automated
system; and allow for their timely,
authorized disposition. Records include
but are not limited to: user guides, system
or sub-system definitions, system
specifications, input and output
specifications, system flow charts,
program flow charts, program
maintenance logs, change notices, data
element dictionaries, file layouts, code
books or tables, and other records that
explain the meaning, purpose, structure,
logical relationships, and origin of the data
elements.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
CAUTION: Software needed for
access to electronic records must
be retained for the period of time
required to access the records.

series_description:
Electronic records or automated logs
created to monitor computer systems
such as print spool logs, console logs, tape
activity logs etc.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_title:
Chargeback Records to
Data Processing Services
Users
series_description:
Records used to document, calculate
costs, and bill program units for computer
usage and data processing services. These
records are also used for cost recovery,
budgeting, or administrative purposes.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Forms and logs used to enter and
reconcile data sets submitted for
processing.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_title:
Software Registrations,
Warranties and License
Agreements
series_description:
Records documenting the registration and
licensing of a software application to
activate the software for legal use by the
end users of a state agency, along with
warranties providing that the software will
perform in accordance with functional
specifications.
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 3 years

series_description:
Records documenting the request for and
response to help desk tickets received by
divisions or units, such as information
technology.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_description:
Biennial information security plan for
protecting the security of the agency’s
information.
retention_statement: Until Superseded

series_description:
Applications, resumes, transcripts, letters
of reference, and similar documents
whose submission by candidates for
vacant positions is required on the
application form, by application
procedures, or in the employment
advertisement.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

series_description:
Notes, memoranda, or reports relating to
the counseling of an employee for work -
related, personal, or substance abuse
problems. Usually maintained at the
supervisorial level except in those
agencies with counseling staff.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
Internal or external announcements or
advertisements of job openings,
promotions, training programs, or
opportunities for overtime.

Includes a contract or agreement
regarding the terms and conditions of
employment of an individual and a
contract with a vendor for temporary
staffing services.
Executed, renewed, or amended on or
after September 1, 2015.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years

series_description:
Includes a contract or agreement
regarding the terms and conditions of
employment of an individual and a
contract with a vendor for temporary
staffing services.
Executed, renewed, or amended on or
before August 31, 2015.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Job evaluations, performance appraisals,
or other similar documents used to
evaluate the performance of an employee.

Disciplinary actions are those actions
which may affect pay, status, or tenure.
They are imposed to discipline an
employee whose conduct is harmful to the
best interests of the state, the agency, or
the employee workforce; and for failure to
improve performance or conduct
following imposition of corrective action.
May include cause for demotion,
suspension, or dismissal, and the reasons
for failure to give written notice of
resignation. May also be used to
document evidence of employees self -
improvement efforts, as well as favorable
and unfavorable communication.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

series_description:
Forms or similar records used to create or
change information concerning the
records of an employee including pay
grade, position classification, employee
number, evaluation date, and termination
of employment.

Job descriptions, including all associated
task or skill statements, for positions in an
agency.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Criminal history record information on job
applicants or agency employees obtained
from the Department of Public Safety
(DPS).
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
CAUTION: An agency that is
authorized to obtain criminal
history record information from
DPS must refer to its agency's
legislation or see Subchapter F,
Chapter 411, Government Code for
appropriate retention and use of
this information.

series_description:
Certificates of completion, certifications,
licenses, transcripts, test scores, or similar
records documenting the training, testing,
or continuing education achievements of
an employee.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

series_description: Federal reporting form (Form I-9).
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_description:
Summary of applicant qualifications,
evaluation basis for selection or rejection,
original applications, job assignments,
promotions, separations, layoffs,
terminations, compensation records,
conditions of work, time records, hours of
training provided (separate from labor),
minority status, and gender of all selected
and rejected applicants.
Awards, incentives, tenure, etc.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

series_title:
Employee Drug Testing
and Screening Records –
Positive Results and
Calibration
series_description:
Records of employee alcohol test results
indicating an alcohol concentration of 0.02
or greater; records of employee verified
positive controlled substances test results;
documentation of refusals to take
required alcohol and/or controlled
substances tests; employee evaluation and
referrals; calibration documentation;
records related to the administration of
the alcohol and controlled substances
testing programs; copy of each annual
calendar year summary.
legal_citation:
49 CFR 382.403 for
commercial motor
vehicle drivers.

series_title:
Employee Drug Testing
and Screening Records –
Negative Results
series_description:
Records of negative and canceled
controlled substances test results and
alcohol test results with a concentration of
less than 0.02.

Agreements between employee and
agency authorizing certain actions,
including acknowledgement forms,
telecommuting agreements,
outside/secondary employment
authorizations, or other documentation
that show proof of receipt and awareness
of and adherence to agency policies and
procedures.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
Employee or applicant requests for
reasonable accommodation under the
ADA (Americans with Disabilities Act).
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
Documentation used to start, modify, or
stop all voluntary or required deductions
from payroll, including garnishment or
other court-ordered attachments.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Payroll records and registers documenting
employee earnings, wages, and pay. This
may include but is not limited to payroll
input records, summary statements,
payroll vouchers, payroll detail sheets, and
payroll history.

Includes 1099, W-2, FICA, and other tax
records.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Used to make increases or decreases to
employee's gross pay, FICA, retirement, or
in the computation of taxes.

Employer's copy of the "Employee's
Withholding Exemption Certificate."
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Records defining the wage or salary rate
for each position in the agency expressed
in dollars, grades, or step numbers.

Records and documentation relating to
unemployment compensation claims,
including reimbursement of funds
disbursed by Texas Workforce Commission
(TWC).
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

series_description:
Forms used to deposit employee’s
earnings into a specified personal account.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_description:
Records documenting the amount of
pension or deferred compensation earned
by individual employees.

Affirmative action plans for regular
employees.

Affirmative action plans for apprenticeship
programs.

retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_description:
Reports providing statistical information
on the labor force.

Records relating to review and monitoring
of job classifications within an agency.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 3 years

series_description:
Work, duty, shift, crew or case schedules,
rosters, or assignments.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_description:
Reports to the agency from TWC or its
predecessor pertaining to employees.

Requests and authorizations for travel;
participation in educational programs,
workshops, or college classes; or for other
work-related activities for which the
expenses of the employee are defrayed or
reimbursed.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Any internally distributed manuals,
guidelines, or similar records that define
agency wide policies and procedures
concerning the personnel of an agency.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 3 years

series_description:
Any documents detailing the procedural
duties and responsibilities of agency
positions on a position-by-position basis.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 3 years

series_description:
Any reports compiled by an agency on
aspects of personnel staffing, including
listings of all staff by program or name,
staff hired during a month, detailed listings
of employees within its organizational
structure, position vacancies, analysis of
turnover rates and seasonality of
employment, etc.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 3 years

series_description:
Aptitude, competency, or skills tests and
checklists required of job applicants or of
current personnel to qualify for promotion
or transfer, including validation records.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
CAUTION: One copy of each
different test (different in terms of
either questions or administration
procedures) should be retained for
the period indicated.

series_description:
Completed aptitude, competency, or skills
test papers and checklists of job applicants
or of current personnel taking a test to
qualify for promotion or transfer.

Includes documentation used to complete
EEO (Equal Employment Opportunity)
reports.

Reports, studies, aggregated or summary
data, and similar documentation compiled
to monitor and demonstrate compliance
with the federal Equal Pay Act.

Diversity and recruitment plans and
related workforce analyses.

Used to create employee leave balances,
to transfer leave balances when an
employee transfers positions, to adjust
carry-over balances on August 31, to
correct errors on leave accumulation, and
to close out leave accounts on separated
employees.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years

series_description:
Cumulative report is issued each pay cycle
and provides employee leave status
information for each position.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years

series_description:
Records documenting individual
employee’s hours worked, including work
schedules and documentation evidencing
adherence to or deviation from normal
hours for those employees working on
fixed schedules.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years

series_title:
Time Off and/or Sick Leave
Requests
series_description:
Requests and authorizations for vacation,
compensatory, sick, Family and Medical
Leave Act (FMLA), sick pool leave, and
other types of authorized leave, and
supporting documentation.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years

series_description:
Records documenting number of hours
transferred in and out of comprehensive
sick leave pool.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years

series_description:
Claims; invoices; statements; copies of
checks and purchase orders; expenditure
authorizations; ledgers; encumbrance,
purchase, general journal, expenditure,
and special vouchers; and similar records
that serve to document disbursements,
including those documenting claims for
and reimbursement to employees for
travel and other expenses.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Bill copies or stubs, statements, billing
registers, account cards, deposit warrants,
cash receipts, credit card receipts, receipts
books, cash transfers, daily cash reports,
reconciliations, general journal vouchers,
special vouchers, and similar records that
serve to document money owed to or
received by a state agency and its
collection or receipt.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Periodic reports compiled from
information entered into the Uniform
Statewide Accounting System (USAS).
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_description:
Yearly report compiled from information
entered into the Uniform Statewide
Accounting System (USAS).
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Sufficient records to verify information on
unclaimed property previously reported to
the State Comptroller showing the name
and last known address of the apparent
owner of reportable unclaimed property, a
brief description of the property, and the
balance of each unclaimed account, if
appropriate.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years

series_description:
Records documenting the internal and
external procedural requirements with
respect to the accounting department of a
state agency.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 3 years

series_description:
Records of accounts deemed uncollectible,
including write-off authorizations and
returned checks, warrants, and drafts.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
Documentation relating to the capital and
fixed assets of a state agency, including
equipment or property history cards
containing data on initial cost,
depreciation schedules or summaries used
for capital outlay budgeting, and property
sale, auction, or disposal records of agency
owned equipment and property.
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 3 years

series_description:
Records documenting requests for
payment of a sum of money according to
the terms of a policy or contract.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
This series documents state and federal
grant projects participated in or
administered by state agencies. It includes
grant authorization records, which provide
evidence of the award of grants to or by
agencies; grant/project financial or
performance reports, which are periodic
reports of financial activity and/or
program performance related to grants
received or made by agencies.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
CAUTION: Retention requirement
may vary depending upon the
specific federal funding agency.
Agencies must ensure that records
are retained for the appropriate
retention period.

series_description:
Records documenting financial obligations
of a state agency that are not payable
within one year of the date of the balance
sheet, including debentures, loans,
deferred tax liabilities, bonds, and pension
obligations.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
Signature cards or similar records
establishing authority of an agency
employee to initiate or authorize all
transactions on behalf of an agency.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Logs documenting requests and receipt of
FTI, including any information created by
the recipient that is derived from federal
return or return information received from
the IRS or obtained through a secondary
source.

Indirect cost plan and supporting
documentation created or maintained in
the development of the plan.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
Bank statements, credit card statements,
cancelled checks, check registers, deposit
slips, debit and credit notices,
reconciliations, and other banking related
records.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Required by the General Appropriations
Act. Includes encumbrances and
documentation about budget transfers
and revisions, as well as detail charts of
accounts.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Records documenting incoming or
outgoing deliveries, including through
private courier services.

Any mailing address, telephone or fax
number, or email address records
maintained by an agency on its employees
or on entities or persons it serves.
retention_statement: Until Superseded

series_description:
Records and reports of postage expenses,
including postal meter usage.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_title:
Requisitions for In-Agency
or Inter-Agency
Copy/Printing Service
series_description:
Includes word processing and data
processing.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_description:
Licenses and permits obtained from
external agencies or organizations in order
to perform operations.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include licenses
and permits issued by an agency as
part of its statutory responsibilities.

series_title:
Photocopier and Telefax
Usage Logs & Reports
series_description:
Registers or logs of print copies and fax
transmissions made by user or in total.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_description:
Schedules of prices charged by an agency
for services to the public or other
agencies, including any documentation
used to determine the charges.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 3 years

series_description:
Liability, theft, fire, health, life,
automobile, and other policies for
government property and personnel
including supporting documentation
relevant to the implementation,
modification, renewal, or replacement of
policies.
Executed, renewed, or amended on or
after September 1, 2015.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years

series_description:
Liability, theft, fire, health, life,
automobile, and other policies for
government property and personnel
including supporting documentation
relevant to the implementation,
modification, renewal, or replacement of
policies.
Executed, renewed, or amended on or
before August 31, 2015.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Any internally distributed manuals,
guidelines, or similar records that establish
standard office procedures for an agency;
for example, agency style manuals,
telephone protocols, mailroom
procedures, printshop and photocopy
ordering instructions.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 1 year

series_description:
Any record created by an agency to track
any type of incoming and outgoing
correspondence or packages by the U.S.
Postal Service or by private couriers.

List of agency contracts, leases, and
agreements including general obligation,
land lease, utilities, and construction
contracts.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Assessments or evaluations of the value of
state-owned buildings or property.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_description:
Records documenting building space
requests and approvals. Information on
request forms may include but is not
limited to: the building and room; the
reason for the change; parties involved in
the request; date of request and approval.

Records documenting the determination,
checking, or rectifying of any instrument
giving quantitative measurements.
comments:
CAUTION: Some equipment and
instruments may require longer
retention period. State agencies
must determine if longer retention
period is required based on the
type of equipment or instruments
they use within their agency.

retention_statement: Life of Asset
After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_title:
Estimate Files (Supply and
Repair Cost Estimates)
series_description:
Quotes for minor construction and repair
projects and supplies. Includes supporting
documentation, as applicable.

Requests or work orders for repairs or
maintenance to facilities, vehicles, or
equipment completed by internal agency
personnel or external service providers.

Any type of usage report or log used to
monitor utilities such as gas, electric,
water, etc.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include utility
usage reports for agencies that
operate their own utilities.

series_description:
Equipment and material descriptions and
specifications that may include but are not
limited to detailed descriptions; lists of
raw materials and ingredients; physical
characteristics of items; special handling
procedures; or technical drawings.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
Reservation logs or similar records relating
to the use of agency facilities such as
meeting rooms, auditoriums, etc.

Reports summarizing efficiency of facility
space utilization, which may include data
on room usage, demand, allocation, and
capacity.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_description:
Documentation of mail returned by the
postal or other mail delivery services as
undeliverable.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year
comments:
CAUTION: If corrected address
provided and mail rerouted,
maintain address update
documentation for prescribed
retention period.

series_description:
Freight or cargo claims against carrier for
damage or loss to a shipment.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
Shipping information, including order
acknowledgements, packing slips, and
related documentation.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
CAUTION: Some shipping
information may require longer
retention period. State agencies
must determine if longer retention
period is required based on the
type of materials shipped to or
from their agency.

series_description:
Includes bid requisition/authorizations,
invitations to bid or propose, bid
specifications, awarded and unawarded
bids, and bid tabulation /evaluations.
Associated with a contract executed,
renewed, or amended on or after
September 1, 2015.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years

series_description:
Includes bid requisition/authorizations,
invitations to bid or propose, bid
specifications, awarded and unawarded
bids, and bid tabulation /evaluations.
Associated with a contract executed,
renewed, or amended on or before August
31, 2015.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Invalid bids that do not meet agency
submission requirements and are not
included in bid evaluation process (e.g.
withdrawn, missed submission deadline,
incomplete submission, etc.)
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
Log, register, etc., providing a record of
purchase orders issued, orders received,
and similar data on procurement status.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
W-9 IRS Form used to request a taxpayer
identification number (TIN) for reporting
information to the Internal Revenue
Service (IRS). This includes W-9 forms
received by a state agency from vendors.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
Plans for evacuation of agency facilities in
cases of emergency.
retention_statement: Until Superseded

series_description:
Fire, safety, and other inspection records
of agency facilities and equipment,
including orderd issued by inspectors to
correct deficiencies in comp;iane with any
code or regulations.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include
inspection reports of building
construction. SEE item number
5.2.028.

series_description:
Plan that provides information to
employees about the hazardous chemicals
to which they may be exposed to in their
workplace.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 5 years

series_description:
List of each hazardous chemical normally
present in the workplace.

Logs, registers, or similar records
documenting visitors to limited access or
restricted areas of agency facilities.

Records relating to the issuance of keys,
identification cards, building passes,
passwords, signed statements or similar
instruments of access to agency or state
facilities, equipment or automated
systems.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
Reports of accidents to adults on state
property or in any other situation in which
the state agency could be a party to a
lawsuit.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
Reports of accidents to minors on state
property or in any other situation in which
the state agency could be a party to a
lawsuit.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
Environmental, biological, and material
safety monitoring reports, including health
or physical examination reports or
certificates of employees, who have
experienced exposure to toxic substances,
harmful physical agent, or bloodborne
pathogens in the workplace, including
analyses derived from such reports.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 30 years

series_description:
Environmental, biological, and material
safety monitoring reports, including health
or physical examination reports or
certificates of employees, for whom
periodic monitoring of health or fitness is
required concerning toxic substances,
harmful physical agent, or bloodborne
pathogens in the workplace, including
analyses derived from such reports.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 2 years

series_description:
Documentation relating to disputed long-
distance calls, including documents
evidencing repayment by employees for
personal log distance use.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
Logs and related documentation used to
maintain information about state owned
aircraft flight data.
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 3 years

series_description:
Logs and related documentation used to
maintain information about leased aircraft
flight data.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description: List of passengers on an aircraft.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years
After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_description:
Includes mileage, fuel/oil consumption,
passengers carried and other related
operational information.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Vehicle titles, registration information, and
owner manuals for state vehicles.
retention_statement: Life of Asset

series_description:
Records documenting issuance of parking
permits and assignments.
retention_statement: Until Superseded
